Hi sweetie,

Just checking — did the garlic ginger sauce work this time? Remember to add the cornstarch slurry at the very end or it gets gloopy.

Dad says hi. We'll talk Sunday at 11.

Love,
Mom

subject: [ridgeline] New issue: panic in bookmark importer
snippet: A new error was detected in ridgeline production: runtime error: invalid memory address...
body:
Sentry detected a new issue in ridgeline (production):

runtime error: invalid memory address or nil pointer dereference
in importer.ParseOPML (importer/opml.go:88)

First seen: 2 minutes ago. 3 events.

View: https://jmurray-dev.sentry.io/issues/4408821/

— Sentry

subject: Pike Street Friday?
snippet: You in for burgers Friday? They've got that new hazy IPA on tap...
body:
Yo,

You in for burgers Friday at Pike Street? They've got that new hazy IPA on tap that you'll like. 7ish?

Also bring the spare USB-C cable you said you had, mine died.

— Jake

subject: Re: Pike Street Friday?
snippet: I'm in. 7 works. Got the cable, it's yours...
body:
I'm in. 7 works. Got the cable, it's yours.

Might be a few min late, deploying a Ridgeline fix before I leave. See you there.

— Jason

subject: homelab k8s question
snippet: Random Saturday question — how are you handling cert rotation on your cluster?...
body:
Hey Jason,

Random Saturday question — how are you handling cert rotation on your homelab cluster? I'm setting up cert-manager at home and the Let's Encrypt DNS challenge is fighting me.

Want to pair on it sometime? Coffee on me.

— Priya

subject: Re: homelab k8s question
snippet: cert-manager + Cloudflare DNS01 solver. I'll send you my issuer manifest...
body:
cert-manager with the Cloudflare DNS01 solver — way smoother than HTTP01 behind a homelab NAT.

I'll send you my ClusterIssuer manifest. The trick is scoping the API token to just DNS edit on the one zone.

Coffee at Elm sometime this week works.

— Jason

— Leo
